title: Ordinary Coins
description: Adds coins you could use in an economy on a server.
body:
###### Inspired by: [Ordinary Coins](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ordinary-coins)

I've updated it to a newer version of Minecraft and added more Coins.

##### WARNING: REMOVING THIS MOD WILL MAKE ALL VILLAGER TRADES USING COINS BE AIR

To see my To-Do List. Click [HERE](https://trello.com/b/nrdthmma/ordinary-coins)

## Features:
<details>
<summary>Coins</summary>

- ![Copper Coin [Normal]](https://i.imgur.com/jhPyqyE.png)
- ![Iron Coin [Normal]](https://i.imgur.com/kPyMmfu.png)
- ![Gold Coin [Normal]](https://i.imgur.com/c4cPHFN.png)
- ![Diamond Coin [Normal]](https://i.imgur.com/feLz2H2.png)
- ![Netherite Coin [Normal]](https://i.imgur.com/UeGjOvZ.png)
- ![Emerald Coin [Normal]](https://i.imgur.com/riWNh6q.png)
- ![Brass Coin [Mod "Create" to be crafted]](https://i.imgur.com/soI5Hx8.png)
- ![Zinc Coin [Mod "Create" to be crafted]](https://i.imgur.com/C1zMrE6.png)

</details>

Mobs drop Coins with a Chance of 25% (configurable via Config)

**Coin Recipe:**
![Coin Recipe](https://i.imgur.com/7epu7Vo.png)
